testcase.name: test_print_cqm_stats
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_utils.TestUtils testMethod=test_print_cqm_stats>
def test_print_cqm_stats(self): test_bqm = dimod.BQM('BINARY') with self.assertRaises(ValueError): print_cqm_stats(test_bqm)
test_cqm = dimod.CQM() r = dimod.Real('r') b = dimod.Binary('b') i = dimod.Integer('i') test_cqm.add_constraint(r == 1) test_cqm.add_constraint(b >= 0.5) test_cqm.add_constraint(i <= 2)
cqm_stats_stream = StringIO() sys.stdout = cqm_stats_stream print_cqm_stats(test_cqm) sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__ printed_string = cqm_stats_stream.getvalue()
expected_field_values = ['1','1','1','0','3','0','1','1','1']
> self.assertEqual(printed_string.splitlines()[-1].split(), expected_field_values) E AssertionError: Lists differ: ['└────────────┴─────────────┴─────────────┘'] != ['1', '1', '1', '0', '3', '0', '1', '1', '1'] E E First differing element 0: E '└────────────┴─────────────┴─────────────┘' E '1' E E Second list contains 8 additional elements. E First extra element 1: E '1' E E - ['└────────────┴─────────────┴─────────────┘'] E + ['1', '1', '1', '0', '3', '0', '1', '1', '1']
/Users/namugo/Desktop/대학대학/1. Spring 2026/CS-UH 3260 004 Software Analytics/Assignments/Replication 2/Replication_MigrateLib/repos/dwave-examples@3d-bin-packing__abb0ebd3__tabulate__rich/tests/test_utils.py:57: AssertionError
